content.rendered: Parthiban, better known as Parts, is the General Manager of the Boot Firmware Group, leading the development of next-generation firmware technologies that power up modern computing platforms. Parts drives the strategy, execution and delivery of boot firmware solutions that power up processors across the entire compute spectrum, including hyperscale, AI, enterprise, client and embedded environments, for all CPU architectures including x86, Arm & RISC. He has more than 28 years of experience in the industry with numerous patents from the USPTO. He has a Master of Computer Applications from Anna University and an MBA from Georgia State University.
